title: Mountain Rumble f20
description: This mod adds giants that 12 different sizes of giants, each with different limbs and entities, and they spit light rays from their mouths. Forge MCver1.20.0
body:
This mod adds giants that 12 different sizes of giants, each with different limbs and entities, and they spit light rays from their mouths.
The player can attack by right-clicking with a sword. You can deal damage by running into the giant entity.When the legs disappear, the body will fall, so you can hit the body directly on the ground. However, if you don't hurry, it will grab you and carry you to the giant's mouth.
